title: HIF Global Announces e-Fuels Project in Brazil
content: HIF Global, the worldâ€™s leading e-Fuels company, announced its first project in Brazil, after signing today a land reservation contract with Port of AÃ§u, one of Brazil's main ports, to develop a facility to produce up to 800,000 tons per year of e-Methanol.
